steps.action: Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in Chrome.
steps.expected: Header loads and PGL logo is visible top-left.

steps.action: Click the PGL logo.
steps.expected: Browser navigates to https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ (site homepage) and page title matches expected homepage title.

steps.action: Repeat for https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and https://jobs.qa.pgl.co.uk/.
steps.expected: Each logo click navigates to the respective site's staging homepage.

steps.action: Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ at desktop viewport 1366x768.
steps.expected: Header menu spacing, fonts, icons and colours match reference screenshot from AssetsForDev.zip; no overlap or missing icons.

steps.action: Capture screenshot and compare to reference.
steps.expected: Visual diff within accepted tolerance or discrepancies logged as defects.

steps.action: Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in Chrome.
steps.expected: Page loads with header present.

steps.action: Hover the top-level menu item 'Holidays' (or equivalent).
steps.expected: Submenu appears within 1s; no console JS errors.

steps.action: Move pointer into submenu and interact.
steps.expected: Submenu remains visible while interacting and closes on pointer leave.

title: TC-04 - Mobile: hamburger, expand/collapse and navigation

steps.action: Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in mobile emulator (375x812) or device.
steps.expected: Page loads with hamburger icon visible.

steps.action: Tap hamburger to open menu.
steps.expected: Menu opens and items are tappable.

steps.action: Tap a parent item to expand children, then tap a leaf link 'Activities'.
steps.expected: Navigation to expected page succeeds (HTTP 200) and page content heading matches expected.

title: TC-05 - Keyboard accessibility: focus and navigation

steps.action: Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and press Tab until header/menu gains focus.
steps.expected: Header interactive elements receive focus in logical order.

steps.action: With a top-level item focused press Enter to open submenu; use Arrow keys to navigate and Enter to activate.
steps.expected: Submenu opens via keyboard; Arrow keys move focus; Enter activates link and navigates.

steps.action: Start NVDA and open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/.
steps.expected: NVDA announces page load.

steps.action: Navigate to the menu and open items using NVDA navigation keys.
steps.expected: ARIA roles and expanded/collapsed states are announced; menu usable by screen reader.

steps.action: Tab through header elements and confirm a visible focus indicator is present for each interactive control.
steps.expected: Focus indicator is clearly visible for each control.

steps.action: Run a contrast check for menu text vs background (Axe or WCAG checker).
steps.expected: Contrast ratio meets WCAG AA (>=4.5:1 for normal text).

steps.action: Resize viewport to widths: 1280, 1024, 768, 600, 375 and check header layout.
steps.expected: Header adapts correctly; no overlap/truncation.

steps.action: Test at boundary widths e.g. 767 and 769, 599 and 601.
steps.expected: No layout break at -1px/+1px boundaries.

steps.action: Click each top-level and submenu link from https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.
steps.expected: Each destination returns HTTP 200 and page heading/title matches expected.

steps.action: Confirm menu when signed out on https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.
steps.expected: Signed-out menu items visible as expected.

steps.action: Log in as testuser+ts01@pgl.co.uk / Password1! and observe menu.
steps.expected: Signed-in menu shows user-specific items; role-based differences visible if applicable.

steps.action: Log out and confirm menu returns to signed-out state.
steps.expected: Menu returns to signed-out view; logo redirect unchanged.

steps.action: Open header mapping in CMS or mapping file and confirm logo target URL for each site.
steps.expected: CMS mapping lists correct homepage targets for each site entry.

steps.action: Click logo on staging and confirm runtime redirect matches CMS mapping.
steps.expected: Runtime behavior matches CMS mapping.

steps.action: Block header JS resource in DevTools and reload https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.
steps.expected: Essential navigation remains reachable where possible; console errors captured for dev triage.

steps.action: Restore resource and verify normal behavior.
steps.expected: Header/menu returns to normal behavior after resource restored.

title: TC-13 - Footer: content, links, branding and accessibility

steps.action: Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and scroll to footer.
steps.expected: Footer matches design: columns, logos, certification badge and phone number present.

steps.action: Click each footer link and confirm HTTP 200 and expected target.
steps.expected: Footer links navigate to expected pages.

steps.action: On mobile viewport confirm tappable areas and stack order.
steps.expected: Footer stacks correctly and links are tappable on mobile.
